name: SDSS_sql_search
description: Query the Sloan Digital Sky Survey (SDSS) Data Release 18 database using SQL. SDSS is one of the most comprehensive astronomical surveys, imaging 1/3 of the sky with data on 500 million objects. Key tables: PhotoObjAll (photometric objects: galaxies, stars, quasars), SpecObj (spectroscopic objects with redshifts and classifications), PhotoPrimary (unique photometric sources). Key columns: ra, dec (coordinates), objid (unique ID), z (redshift for SpecObj), class (STAR/GALAXY/QSO), u/g/r/i/z (magnitudes in 5 photometric bands). Use SQL TOP N for limiting results.

cmd.description: SQL query against the SDSS DR18 database. Examples: 'SELECT TOP 10 objid,ra,dec,r FROM PhotoObjAll WHERE ra BETWEEN 180 AND 181 AND dec BETWEEN 0 AND 1', 'SELECT TOP 5 specObjID,ra,dec,z,class FROM SpecObj WHERE class=\'GALAXY\' AND z BETWEEN 0.1 AND 0.2', 'SELECT TOP 5 objid,ra,dec,g,r,i FROM PhotoPrimary WHERE g < 18 ORDER BY g'

test_examples.cmd: SELECT TOP 5 objid,ra,dec,r,g FROM PhotoPrimary WHERE ra BETWEEN 180 AND 181 AND dec BETWEEN 0 AND 1
SELECT TOP 5 specObjID,ra,dec,z,class FROM SpecObj WHERE class='GALAXY' AND z BETWEEN 0.05 AND 0.1
SELECT TOP 5 specObjID,ra,dec,z FROM SpecObj WHERE class='QSO' AND z BETWEEN 2.0 AND 3.0 ORDER BY z

oneOf.description: Query result tables. Each element has TableName (string) and Rows (array of result row objects). Access results via data[0]['Rows'].

Rows.description: Result rows as objects with column names as keys (e.g., ra, dec, objid, z, class, r, g, i)
